Description.Name: Excalibur
Description.Details:
The Excalibur is designed to engage an enemy at long range and use its mobility to dictate the ranges of the engagement. The 'Mech is named for the appearance of the muzzle and dummy hand on the right arm, which reminded the design team of the look of a medieval Terran sword. The EXC-B2 first saw service in 2620 and served with SLDF forces well in Operation Smother and the Amaris Civil War. However, the Excalibur has proven to be most potent when supported by other types of BattleMechs, primarily due to insufficient armor. Excalibur MechWarriors were often derisively called 'Streakers' during the Amaris Coup due to their hit-and-run attacks and refusals of stand-up fights. By the time of Operation EXODUS, most surviving examples were found in the 328th Royal BattleMech Division and left with General Kerensky. The 'Mech has an impressive top speed of 86.4 km/h, which is made possible through the use of a Ford 350 XL engine. The Excalibur carries a relatively light seven and a half tons of armor, with CASE in both side torsos to protect against an ammunition explosion. With its mission of long-range combat, the Excalibur does not need a very high level of armor protection. The Excalibur dissipates its waste heat through the use of eleven heat sinks. For added protection against missile attacks, the Excalibur had a McArthur anti-missile system. As its primary weapon, the Excalibur carries a powerful Grizzard Model 200 Gauss rifle that has an effective range of up to six hundred and sixty meters. This is backed up by an Ingrid Systems LRM-20 with an Artemis IV fire control computer for increased missile accuracy. The B2b is very similar to the B2, except that the use of an Endo Steel structure allows for an additional three and a half tons of armor. This variant was utilized by the SLDF Royals.

X-class mechs feature upgrades to their armour, thermal management and defensive systems that improve their survivability on the 31st century battlefield.

YangsThoughts: The improved heatsinks and improved armor help a lot with letting this version actually get in brawling fights, but you still wanna try to snipe unless you change out that weaponry.
